title: Branch protection na master
description: Sozdat GitHub Actions workflow ili dokumentaciyu dlya nastroyki branch protection rules na master: require PR review, require CI pass (pytest), no direct push to master. NE primenyat nastroyki - tolko sgenerirovat kod/instrukciyu.
why_now: CI uzhe nastroyen (2.1 done), branch protection - sleduyushchiy shag po Roadmap
